message: Removed repeated compiled artifact byte copies in host guard paths by adding trusted internal byte-memory access for SafeIR.Hosting while preserving public defensive-copy construction and getters.

Verified fixed compiled artifact byte-copy reduction: public AssemblyBytes remains defensive-copying, constructor/init still snapshot external arrays, guard/cache hot paths use internal ReadOnlyMemory/span or internal owned bytes for length/hash/verification/loading without repeated public getter copies. Validation passed: dotnet test tests/SafeIR.Tests/SafeIR.Tests.csproj --configuration Release --filter FullyQualifiedName~CompiledArtifactGuardTests|FullyQualifiedName~CompiledMaterializationCacheTests|FullyQualifiedName~BackendIsolationTests (28 passed); ./scripts/check-csharp-file-lines.ps1 (CodeEnforcer passed); ./scripts/agentq.ps1 doctor (doctor ok).
